title: Why Hot Metal Glows
script_summary: Exploring how temperature affects the color of thermal radiation.

segments.voiceover: Ever wonder why hot metal glows?
It's all about something called blackbody radiation.
As temperature rises, the color changes from red to orange to white.
This happens because atoms vibrate faster, releasing energy as light.
So, when you see glowing metal, it’s a dance of heat and light!
Curious for more science? Follow for mind-blowing facts!
